import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from simulator.models import PlayerConfig, MonsterConfig
from simulator.engine import pve_compare, pvp_battle
from simulator.calc import player_hp, monster_stats
from ui.battle_viewer import _config_hash, _merge_pvp_events, _log_html

p1 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='양손검'\)
p2 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='지팡이'\)
m = MonsterConfig\(\)

result = pve_compare\(p1, p2, m\)
print\('PVE events P1:', len\(result.p1.events\)\)
print\('PVE events P2:', len\(result.p2.events\)\)
print\('Sample event:', result.p1.events[0]\)

pvp = pvp_battle\(p1, p2\)
merged = _merge_pvp_events\(pvp, player_hp\(p1\), player_hp\(p2\)\)
print\('PVP merged events:', len\(merged\)\)
print\('Merged sample:', merged[0]\)
print\('Hash:', _config_hash\(p1, p2, m\)\)
print\('ALL OK'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/AI_simulator && python -c "
from simulator.models import PlayerConfig, MonsterConfig
from simulator.engine import pve_compare
from ui.battle_viewer import _merge_pve_events, _kill_info

p1 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='양손검'\)
p2 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='지팡이'\)
m = MonsterConfig\(tier='Tier1', grade='Normal'\)  # HP 낮은 몬스터로 킬 테스트

from simulator.calc import monster_stats
stats = monster_stats\(m\)
print\('Monster HP:', stats['hp']\)

result = pve_compare\(p1, p2, m\)
events = _merge_pve_events\(result, stats['hp']\)
print\('Merged events:', len\(events\)\)

# 킬 포인트 찾기
prev_w = 1
for ev in events:
    kills, mon_hp, is_kill = _kill_info\(ev['combined_total'], stats['hp']\)
    w = kills + 1
    if w != prev_w:
        print\(f'  Kill at t={ev[\\"t\\"]:.1f}s wave={w} combined={ev[\\"combined_total\\"]}'\)
        prev_w = w

print\('Total kills:', max\(ev[\\"combined_total\\"] // stats[\\"hp\\"] for ev in events\)\)
print\('ALL OK'\)
" 2>&1)

from simulator.models import PlayerConfig, MonsterConfig
from simulator.engine import pvp_battle
from simulator.calc import player_hp
from ui.battle_viewer import _merge_pvp_events

p1 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='양손검', level=30\)
p2 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='지팡이', level=30\)
result = pvp_battle\(p1, p2\)
hp1 = player_hp\(p1\)
hp2 = player_hp\(p2\)

events = _merge_pvp_events\(result, hp1, hp2\)
print\(f'Events until death: {len\(events\)}'\)
last = events[-1]
print\(f'Last event: t={last[\\"t\\"]:.1f}s P1_hp={last[\\"p1_hp\\"]} P2_hp={last[\\"p2_hp\\"]} battle_over={last[\\"battle_over\\"]}'\)
print\('Winner logic OK:', 'P1 wins' if last['p2_hp'] == 0 else 'P2 wins'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/AI_simulator && python -c "
from simulator.models import PlayerConfig, MonsterConfig
from simulator.engine import pve_compare, pvp_battle
from simulator.calc import player_hp, monster_stats
from ui.battle_viewer import _merge_pve_events, _merge_pvp_events, _skill_stats_html

p1 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='양손검'\)
p2 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='지팡이'\)
m  = MonsterConfig\(tier='Tier1', grade='Normal'\)

# PVE 통계 테스트
res = pve_compare\(p1, p2, m\)
evs = _merge_pve_events\(res, monster_stats\(m\)['hp']\)
html = _skill_stats_html\(evs, attacker_filter='P1', label='P1 공격', label_color='#e8b84b'\)
print\('PVE P1 stats HTML length:', len\(html\)\)

# PVP 통계 테스트
pvp = pvp_battle\(p1, p2\)
evs2 = _merge_pvp_events\(pvp, player_hp\(p1\), player_hp\(p2\)\)
html2 = _skill_stats_html\(evs2, attacker_filter='P1', label='P1 공격', label_color='#e8b84b'\)
print\('PVP P1 stats HTML length:', len\(html2\)\)

# 실제 내용 일부 확인
from collections import defaultdict
bucket = defaultdict\(lambda: {'count':0,'total':0}\)
for ev in evs:
    if ev.get\('attacker'\) == 'P1':
        bucket[ev['cmd']]['count'] += 1
        bucket[ev['cmd']]['total'] += ev['dmg']
for cmd, s in sorted\(bucket.items\(\), key=lambda x: -x[1]['total']\):
    print\(f'  {cmd}: {s[\\"count\\"]}회 / {s[\\"total\\"]:,} 피해'\)
print\('ALL OK'\)
" 2>&1)

from simulator.models import PlayerConfig, MonsterConfig
from simulator.engine import pve_compare
p1 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='양손검'\)
p2 = PlayerConfig\(weapon_type='지팡이'\)
m  = MonsterConfig\(\)
result = pve_compare\(p1, p2, m\)
print\('solo1 events:', len\(result.solo1.events\)\)
print\('solo2 events:', len\(result.solo2.events\)\)
print\('solo1 kills:', result.solo1.kills, 'deaths:', result.solo1.deaths\)
print\('solo2 kills:', result.solo2.kills, 'deaths:', result.solo2.deaths\)
print\('solo1 avg_dps:', round\(result.solo1.avg_dps\)\)
print\('solo2 avg_dps:', round\(result.solo2.avg_dps\)\)

# battle_viewer import test
from ui.battle_viewer import _build_pve_timeline, _get_side_state
evs = _build_pve_timeline\(result\)
print\('merged events:', len\(evs\)\)
s1 = _get_side_state\(evs, len\(evs\)-1, 'P1'\)
s2 = _get_side_state\(evs, len\(evs\)-1, 'P2'\)
print\('P1 final kills:', s1['player_kills'], 'deaths:', s1['player_deaths']\)
print\('P2 final kills:', s2['player_kills'], 'deaths:', s2['player_deaths']\)
print\('OK'\)
" 2>&1)

import csv
BASE = 'C:/Users/hoy5343/Documents/스킬 밸런스용/0303/'

# 양손검 3티어 GroupId 200801~200951 이 skill_info에 있는지 확인
target = {str\(x\) for x in [200801,200851,200901,200951,400601,400651,400701,400751,
                             100601,100651,100701,100751,500601,500801]}

print\('=== skill_info.csv에서 직접 root_id 검색 ==='\)
with open\(BASE+'skill_info.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig', newline=''\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    headers = next\(reader\)
    for row in reader:
        if len\(row\) < 3: continue
        d = dict\(zip\(headers, row\)\)
        if d.get\('root_id'\) in target:
            print\(f'  root_id={d[\\"root_id\\"]} | cooltime={d.get\(\\"cooltime\\"\)} | mp={d.get\(\\"cost_m_p\\"\)} | desc={d.get\(\\"desc_name\\",\\"\\"\)[:30]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== skill_info.csv에서 status_tag_condition_cids 기반 검색 \(200801 포함\) ==='\)
check = ['200801','200851','200901','200951','400601','400651']
with open\(BASE+'skill_info.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig', newline=''\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    headers = next\(reader\)
    for row in reader:
        if len\(row\) < 3: continue
        d = dict\(zip\(headers, row\)\)
        cids = d.get\('status_tag_condition_cids',''\)
        if any\(c in cids for c in check\):
            print\(f'  root_id={d[\\"root_id\\"]} | cids={cids[:40]} | cd={d.get\(\\"cooltime\\"\)} | mp={d.get\(\\"cost_m_p\\"\)} | desc={d.get\(\\"desc_name\\",\\"\\"\)[:25]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/AI_simulator && python -c "
import csv, json
from collections import defaultdict

BASE = 'C:/Users/hoy5343/Documents/스킬 밸런스용/0303/'
SKILL_CSV = 'C:/Users/hoy5343/Downloads/[X7]Skill - SkillLevel.csv'

WEAPON_GROUPS = {
    '양손검': {'1티어':{'Q':200401,'W':200451,'E':200501,'R':200551},
               '2티어':{'Q':200601,'W':200651,'E':200701,'R':200751},
               '3티어':{'Q':200801,'W':200851,'E':200901,'R':200951}},
    '지팡이': {'1티어':{'Q':400201,'W':400251,'E':400301,'R':400351},
               '2티어':{'Q':100001,'W':100051,'E':100101,'R':100150},
               '3티어':{'Q':400601,'W':400651,'E':400701,'R':400751}},
    '한손검': {'1티어':{'Q':100201,'W':100251,'E':100301,'R':100351},
               '2티어':{'Q':100401,'W':100451,'E':100501,'R':100551},
               '3티어':{'Q':100601,'W':100651,'E':100701,'R':100751}},
    '단검':   {'1티어':{'Q':500401,'W':500451,'E':500501,'R':500551},
               '2티어':{'Q':500601,'W':500651,'E':500701,'R':500751},
               '3티어':{'Q':500801,'W':500851,'E':500901,'R':500951}},
}
all_groups = {str\(v\) for tiers in WEAPON_GROUPS.values\(\) for cmds in tiers.values\(\) for v in cmds.values\(\)}

# SkillLevel
group_info = defaultdict\(dict\)
with open\(SKILL_CSV, encoding='utf-8-sig', newline=''\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    next\(reader\); headers = next\(reader\)
    for row in reader:
        if len\(row\) < 9: continue
        d = dict\(zip\(headers, row\)\)
        if d.get\('GroupCid'\) in all_groups:
            lv = int\(d['SkillLevel']\)
            group_info[d['GroupCid']][lv] = d['DescName'].strip\(\)

# skill_info: desc_name -> \(cooltime_s, cost_mp\) — 쿨이 있는 것 우선
info_by_name = {}
with open\(BASE+'skill_info.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig', newline=''\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    headers = next\(reader\)
    for row in reader:
        if len\(row\) < len\(headers\): continue
        d = dict\(zip\(headers, row\)\)
        name = d.get\('desc_name',''\).strip\(\)
        cd = int\(d.get\('cooltime',0\)\)
        mp = int\(d.get\('cost_m_p',0\)\)
        if name:
            existing = info_by_name.get\(name\)
            if existing is None or cd > existing['cd_raw']:
                info_by_name[name] = {'cd': cd//1000, 'cd_raw':cd, 'mp': mp, 'root_id': d.get\('root_id',''\)}

# skill_damage: root_id -> [dmg, cri, ticks]
dmg_by_rid = defaultdict\(list\)
with open\(BASE+'skill_damage.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig', newline=''\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    headers = next\(reader\)
    for row in reader:
        if len\(row\) < len\(headers\): continue
        d = dict\(zip\(headers, row\)\)
        dmg_by_rid[d.get\('root_id',''\)].append\({
            'dmg': round\(int\(d.get\('skill_d_m_g_minper',0\)\)/10\),
            'cri': d.get\('cri_use','false'\).lower\(\)=='true'
        }\)

# 출력 \(현재 코드 비교용\)
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

for wpn, tiers in WEAPON_GROUPS.items\(\):
    for tier, cmds in tiers.items\(\):
        print\(f'\\n### {wpn} {tier} ###'\)
        for cmd, gid in cmds.items\(\):
            levels = group_info.get\(str\(gid\), {}\)
            if not levels:
                print\(f'  {cmd}: 데이터 없음'\)
                continue
            rows = []
            for lv in range\(1,6\):
                dname = levels.get\(lv\)
                if not dname:
                    rows.append\(f'Lv{lv}:없음'\)
                    continue
                inf = info_by_name.get\(dname, {'cd':0,'mp':0,'root_id':''}\)
                rid = inf['root_id']
                dmgs = dmg_by_rid.get\(rid, []\)
                total = sum\(x['dmg'] for x in dmgs\)
                cri = dmgs[0]['cri'] if dmgs else False
                tks = len\(dmgs\)
                rows.append\(f'Lv{lv}:cd={inf[\\"cd\\"]}s/mp={inf[\\"mp\\"]}/dmg={total}%/crit={\\"O\\" if cri else \\"X\\"}/ticks={tks}'\)
            sname = levels.get\(1,''\).replace\(' Lv.1',''\)
            print\(f'  {cmd} {sname:<15} | {\\" | \\".join\(rows\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
